headline: Higher NII & Loan Growth to Aid PNC Financial's Q1 Earnings
summary: PNC's Q1 results, scheduled for April 15, are likely to reflect higher NII and loan growth, while fee income pressure and rising expenses may weigh on performance.

headline: Hudson Technologies Announces Election of Alan Sheriff and Jeffrey Feeler as Independent Directors
summary: Appointments Add Capital Markets and Operational ExpertiseWOODCLIFFE LAKE, N.J., April 13, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Hudson Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: HDSN) (“Hudson”; “the Company”) a leading provider of innovative and sustainable refrigerant products and services to the Heating, Ventilation, Air Conditioning and Refrigeration Industry – and one of the nation’s largest refrigerant reclaimers – today announced the appointment of Alan Sheriff and Jeffrey Feeler to the Company’s board of directors

headline: PNC Financial Gears Up For Q1 Print; Here Are The Recent Forecast Changes From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
summary: PNC Financial Services Group (NYSE: PNC) to release Q1 earnings on April 15, with expected EPS of $3.93 and revenue of $6.21 billion. Multiple analysts have issued ratings and price targets for PNC stock.
